title: Bare Bones X AL's Dinosaurs
description: Al's Dinosaurs but in the Bare Bones Style! :D
body:
I took the resource pack, Al's Dinosaurs by [ALtheGatorMC](https://modrinth.com/user/ALtheGatorMC) and remade the textures in the [Bare Bones ](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) Style!  

All credit for the models goes towards ALtheGatorMC and their amazing work ^^
